## What & why

<!-- What does this change and which phase/spec section does it serve? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated (`vitest` and/or `xUnit`); CI `test` check is green
- [ ] Output remains deterministic (no wall-clock/random values baked in)
- [ ] No secret leakage; no network or code-execution added by default
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Conventional commit title (e.g. `feat(exporters): ...`)
